payload.answer: Conflict detected: existing memory says Sam from Goldman has two children; new input says Sam from Goldman has no children. Do not commit either as the current durable fact without resolution.

memory_cards.statement: There is a contradiction about Sam from Goldman’s children: one memory says Sam has two children, while a new statement says Sam has no children.

If later confirmed, replace the child-count fact with the verified value and mark the superseded fact as obsolete.
